title: Dua for Anxiety & Distress
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ، وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijal
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being overpowered by men.
context: Recite when feeling overwhelmed by life, financial stress, or heavy emotional and mental burdens.

title: Dua of Gratitude & Guidance
arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi awzi'ni an ashkura ni'mataka-lati an'amta 'alayya wa 'ala walidayya wa an a'mala salihan tardhahu wa adkhilni bi-rahmatika fi 'ibadika-s-salihin
translation: My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into the ranks of Your righteous servants.
context: Recite when reflecting on Allah's infinite blessings to cultivate humility, family respect, and gratitude.

title: Dua for Patience & Strength
arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَتَوَفَّنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana afrigh 'alayna sabran wa tawaffana muslimeen
translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and let us die as Muslims [in submission to You].
context: Recite during moments of intense tribulation, trial, or when standing up for justice under immense pressure.

title: Dua of Prophet Yunus (Relief from Distress)
arabic: لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu mina-dhalimeen
translation: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.
context: The classic prayer of Jonah inside the whale. Highly effective for instant relief from suffocating distress, depression, and tight situations.

title: Dua for Ease, Clarity & Confidence
arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
transliteration: Rabbish-rah li sadri, wa yassir li amri, wahlul 'uqdatan min lisani, yafqahu qawli
translation: My Lord, expand for me my breast [with assurance] and ease for me my task and untie the knot from my tongue that they may understand my speech.
context: Recite before public speaking, exams, interviews, difficult conversations, or important client presentations.

title: Original Prayer for Sincere Repentance
arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana dhalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakunanna minal-khasireen
translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.
context: The original prayer of Adam (AS) and Eve seeking forgiveness. Recite when repenting from mistakes and seeking deep divine mercy.

title: Sayyid al-Istighfar (The Master Prayer for Forgiveness)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ لَكَ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika ma-stata'tu. A'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bi-ni'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u laka bi-dhanbi faghfir li, fa-innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa ant
translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is none worthy of worship except You. You created me and I am Your slave. I keep Your covenant and my promise to You as far as I am able. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your grace upon me, and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for indeed, none can forgive sins except You.
context: Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ) said whoever recites this in the morning with conviction and dies that day will be of the people of Paradise (and likewise if recited in the evening).

title: Morning & Evening Protection from Harm
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
transliteration: Bismillahilladhi la yadurru ma'as-mihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-sami'ul-'aleem
translation: In the Name of Allah, with Whose Name nothing in the earth or in the heaven can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
context: Recite 3 times in the morning and 3 times in the evening. Protects completely against unexpected harm, sudden calamities, and sickness.

title: Dua for Increase in Knowledge
arabic: رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilman
translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
context: Recite during studies, before researching, reading, coding, or when seeking deep spiritual and intellectual growth.

title: Dua for Well-being & Safety in Both Worlds
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afwa wal-'afiyah fid-dunya wal-akhirah
translation: O Allah, I ask You for forgiveness and well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
context: Recite daily in the morning and evening for protection of health, property, family, and spiritual safety.

title: Dua for Steadfastness of the Heart
arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَىٰ دِينِكَ
transliteration: Ya Muqallibal-qulub thabbit qalbi 'ala deenik
translation: O Turner of Hearts, keep my heart steadfast upon Your religion.
context: The most frequent invocation of the Prophet (ﷺ). Recite often to maintain moral integrity, spiritual discipline, and continuous alignment with the truth.

title: Sincere Prayer for Parents
arabic: رَّبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
transliteration: Rabbir-hamhuma kama rabbayani sagheera
translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them [my parents] as they brought me up when I was small.
context: Recite daily to honor and pray for your parents, living or deceased.

title: Relief Through Divine Mercy
arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ، أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ، وَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ
transliteration: Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyum bi-rahmatika astagheeth, aslih li sha'ni kullahu, wa la takilni ila nafsi tarfata 'ayn
translation: O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining, by Your mercy I seek helper/rescue. Rectify for me all of my affairs, and do not leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye.
context: A master prayer for daily protection. Recite when faced with decisions or when feeling mentally drained and in need of divine intervention.

title: Dua for Halal Provision & Freedom from Debt
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
transliteration: Allahum-makfini bi-halalika 'an haramika, wa aghnini bi-fadlika 'amman siwak
translation: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful and keep me away from what is unlawful, and enrich me with Your bounty, independent of all others.
context: Recite to seek financial blessing, remove dependencies on debts, and find honorable work/Rizq.

title: Dua Upon Leaving the House
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
transliteration: Bismillahi, tawakkaltu 'alallah, la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
translation: In the Name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no power or strength except with Allah.
context: Recite every time you step out of your home. Angels will say, 'You are guided, defended, and protected,' and Shaitan retreats.

title: Dua for a Blessed Spouse & Righteous Children
arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lil-muttaqeena imama
translation: Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous.
context: Recite to invite tranquility, love, respect, and standard righteousness within your family unit.

title: Comprehensive Prayer for Good in Both Worlds
arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan waqina 'adhaban-nar
translation: Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
context: The most comprehensive prayer of the Quran. Covers health, family, success, safety, afterlife ease, and general preservation from hardships.

title: Steadfastness of Belief
arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْوَهَّابُ
transliteration: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana ba'da idh hadaytana wa hab lana min ladunka rahmatan innaka antal-Wahhab
translation: Our Lord, let not our hearts deviate after You have guided us and grant us from Yourself mercy. Indeed, You are the Bestower.
context: Recite to guard yourself against modern ideological confusion, loss of conviction, and spiritual complacency.

title: Seeking Complete Well-being & Protection from Sickness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
transliteration: Allahumma 'afini fi badani, Allahumma 'afini fi sam'i, Allahumma 'afini fi basari, la ilaha illa ant
translation: O Allah, make my body healthy. O Allah, preserve for me my hearing. O Allah, preserve for me my sight. There is no deity worthy of worship except You.
context: Recite 3 times in the morning and evening to protect physical health, mental focus, and preserve your critical senses.

title: Dua of Prophet Job (AS) for Deep Healing and Relief
arabic: أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
transliteration: Anni massaniyad-durru wa anta arhamur-rahimeen
translation: Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful.
context: Prophet Ayoub's (AS) prayer after years of devastating sickness. Recite for miraculous physical healing, mental solace, and relief during physical afflictions.

title: Seeking Protection from the Fire
arabic: رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
transliteration: Rabbanas-rif 'anna 'adhaba jahannama inna 'adhabaha kana gharama
translation: Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever adhering.
context: A crucial daily prayer recited by the servants of the Most Merciful (Ibad-ur-Rahman) seeking divine mercy and safety.

title: Dua of Moses (AS) When in Absolute Need
arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
transliteration: Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqeer
translation: My Lord, indeed I am, for whatever good You would send down to me, in desperate need.
context: Prophet Musa made this dua while homeless, unemployed, and stranded. Instantly, Allah resolved his shelter, safety, income, and marriage. A beautiful dua for the unemployed or those searching for a spouse.

title: Dua for Love, Sincerity, & Integrity
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حُبَّكَ وَحُبَّ مَنْ يُحِبُّكَ وَالْعَمَلَ الَّذِي يُبَلِّغُنِي حُبَّكَ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka hubbak, wa hubba may-yuhibbuk, wal-'amalalladhi yuballighuni hubbak
translation: O Allah, I ask You for Your love, and the love of those who love You, and the deeds that will bring me to Your love.
context: Recite to refine the intention of your worship, seeking spiritual fulfillment and emotional sincerity.

title: Protection from the Grave & Temptations
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabil-qabr, wa min 'adhabi jahannam, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the punishment of Hellfire, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil trial of the False Messiah.
context: A critical protection prayer taught by the Prophet (ﷺ) to be recited before concluding every prayer (before Taslim).

title: Dua for Grief, Heartbreak & Heavy Sorrow
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، وَابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، وَابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ، أَوْ أَنْزَلْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ، أَوْ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَدًا مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، أَوْ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ، أَنْ تَجْعَلَ الْقُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي، وَنُورَ صَدْرِي، وَجَلَاءَ حُزْنِي، وَذَهَابَ هَمِّي
transliteration: Allahumma inni 'abduk, wabnu 'abdik, wabnu amatik, nasiyati bi-yadik, madin fiyya hukmuk, 'adlun fiyya qada'uk, as'aluka bi-kulli ismin huwa lak, sammayta bihi nafsak, aw anzaltahu fi kitabik, aw 'allamtahu ahadam-min khalqik, aw-ista'tharta bihi fi 'ilmil-ghaybi 'indak, an taj'alal-Qur'ana rabee'a qalbi, wa noora sadri, wa jala'a huzni, wa dhahaba hammi
translation: O Allah, I am Your servant, son of Your servant, son of Your maidservant. My forelock is in Your hand, Your decree over me is ever executed, Your judgment upon me is perfectly just. I ask You by every Name belonging to You which You have named Yourself, or revealed in Your Book, or taught to any of Your creation, or preserved in the knowledge of the unseen with You, that You make the Qur'an the spring of my heart, the light of my chest, the banisher of my sadness, and the reliever of my anxiety.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) said that anyone who recites this when feeling severe sorrow, sadness, or anxiety will have their grief turned into happiness and relief by Allah.

title: Simple Morning Adhkar of Total Gratitude
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ
transliteration: Allahumma ma asbaha bi min ni'matin aw bi-ahadim-min khalqika fa-minka wahdaka la sharika lak, fa-lakal-hamdu wa lakash-shukr
translation: O Allah, whatever blessing has come to me or to any of Your creation in this morning is from You alone, without partner, so to You belongs all praise and to You belongs all thanks.
context: Recite in the morning to fulfill the minimum requirement of gratitude for all physiological and spiritual blessings of that day.

title: Protection from Harm & Evil Eye Upon Entering Anywhere
arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
transliteration: A'udhu bi-kalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
context: Recite when entering a hotel, a new house, an unfamiliar place, or when walking in nature. Protects against bites, evil eye, and environmental harm.

title: Dua for Acceptance of Works & Pure Intentions
arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
transliteration: Rabbana taqabbal minna innaka antas-Sami'ul-'Aleem
translation: Our Lord, accept [this] from us. Indeed, You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
context: The prayer of Abraham (AS) upon completing the construction of the Ka'bah. Recite upon finishing any project, charity, study session, or good deed.

title: Dua of the Companions of the Cave (Youth Support)
arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
transliteration: Rabbana atina min ladunka rahmatan wa hayyi' lana min amrina rashada
translation: Our Lord, grant us from Yourself mercy and prepare for us from our affair right guidance.
context: Recite when taking on major risks, startup decisions, career changes, or when fleeing negative environments.

title: Dua for Relief from Physical Pain
arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ
transliteration: A'udhu billahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhir
translation: I seek refuge in Allah and His power from the evil of what I feel and worry about.
context: Place your right hand on the exact area of physical pain. Say 'Bismillah' 3 times, then recite this supplication 7 times.

title: Dua for Protection of Senses and Integrity
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ سَمْعِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ بَصَرِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ لِسَانِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ قَلْبِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَنِيِّي
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min sharri sam'i, wa min sharri basari, wa min sharri lisani, wa min sharri qalbi, wa min sharri maniyyi
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my hearing, from the evil of my seeing, from the evil of my tongue, from the evil of my heart, and from the evil of my desire.
context: Recite to maintain moral purity, guard your senses from committing sins, and protect your inner self from spiritual corruption.

title: Dua Against Bad Character and Illness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُنْكَرَاتِ الأَخْلاَقِ وَالأَعْمَالِ وَالأَهْوَاءِ وَالأَدْوَاءِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min munkaratil-akhlaqi wal-a'mali wal-ahwa'i wal-adwa'
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from undesirable manners, evil deeds, harmful desires, and severe diseases.
context: An excellent short prayer to guard yourself against moral decline, poor habits, mental/spiritual drift, and physical illnesses.

title: Prophet Ibrahim's Prayer for Devoted Prayer and Offspring
arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِي ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ
transliteration: Rabbij-'alnee muqeemas-salati wa min dhurriyyatee Rabbana wa taqabbal du'a'
translation: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and [many] from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication.
context: Recite daily to protect the religious devotion, discipline, and regular prayer habits of yourself and your children.

title: Seeking Pardon for Human Forgetfulness & Errors
arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا
transliteration: Rabbana la tu'akhidhna in-naseena aw akhta'na
translation: Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we have forgotten or erred.
context: Recite to invoke divine mercy and relief from errors made out of honest forgetfulness, ignorance, or simple human weakness.

title: Prophet Yusuf's Prayer for a Righteous Ending
arabic: تَوَفَّنِي مُسْلِمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
transliteration: Tawaffanee musliman wa alhiqnee bis-saliheen
translation: Cause me to die a Muslim and join me with the righteous.
context: Recite to seek final perseverance in faith, a peaceful death in submission to Allah, and honorable company in the hereafter.

title: Refuge from Poverty, Deprivation & Humiliation
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْفَقْرِ، وَالْقِلَّةِ، وَالذِّلَّةِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أَظْلِمَ أَوْ أُظْلَمَ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-faqri, wal-qillati, wadh-dhillati, wa a'udhu bika min an adhlima aw udhlama
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from poverty, scarcity, and humiliation; and I seek refuge in You from committing injustice or being its victim.
context: Perfect for seeking stable financial sustenance, preserving self-dignity, and keeping your dealings just and oppression-free.

title: The Master Prayer for Guidance and Contentment
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-huda wat-tuqa wal-'afafa wal-ghina
translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency (spiritual wealth).
context: A beautifully balanced daily invocation for moral clarity, internal peace, honorable lifestyle choices, and true contentment.

title: Prophet Solomon's Prayer for Forgiveness and Blessing
arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَهَبْ لِي مُلْكًا لَّا يَنبَغِي لِأَحَدٍ مِّن بَعْدِي ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْوَهَّابُ
transliteration: Rabbigh-fir lee wa hab lee mulkan la yanbaghee li-ahadim-mim ba'dee innaka antal-Wahhab
translation: My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower.
context: Recite when working toward honorable professional growth, entrepreneurial breakthroughs, or expanding your positive impact.

title: Dua Against Going Astray or Harming Others
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِلَّ أَوْ أُضَلَّ، أَوْ أَزِلَّ أَوْ أُزَلَّ، أَوْ أَظْلِمَ أَوْ أُظْلَمَ، أَوْ أَجْهَلَ أَوْ يُجْهَلَ عَلَيَّ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika an adilla aw udalla, aw azilla aw uzalla, aw adhlima aw udhlama, aw ajhala aw yujhala 'alayy
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You lest I stray or be led astray, slip or be forced to slip, oppress or be oppressed, act foolishly or be treated foolishly.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) said this when leaving his house. Use it to protect your integrity, intellect, and social relationships daily.

title: Protection from the Trials of Oppressive Environments
arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِّلْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ وَنَجِّنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana la taj'alna fitnatal-lil-qawmidh-dhalimeen wa najjina bi-rahmatika minal-qawmil-kafireen
translation: Our Lord, make us not trial for the wrongdoing people and save us by Your mercy from the disbelieving people.
context: Recite when living or working in environments that challenge your faith, compromise your ethics, or inflict social hostility.

title: The Prayer of Divine Light in All Dimensions
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا، وَفِي بَصَرِي نُورًا، وَفِي سَمْعِي نُورًا، وَعَنْ يَمِينِي نُورًا، وَعَنْ يَسَارِي نُورًا، وَفَوْقِي نُورًا، وَتَحْتِي Nُورًا، وَأَمَامِي نُورًا، وَخَلْفِي نُورًا، وَاجْعَلْ لِي نُورًا
transliteration: Allahummaj-'al fee qalbee nooran, wa fee basaree nooran, wa fee sam'ee nooran, wa 'an yameenee nooran, wa 'an yasaaree nooran, wa fawqee nooran, wa tahtee nooran, wa amamee nooran, wa khalfee nooran, waj-'al lee nooran
translation: O Allah, place light in my heart, light in my sight, light in my hearing, light on my right, light on my left, light above me, light below me, light in front of me, light behind me, and make for me a light.
context: A profound prayer of illumination, usually recited on the way to the mosque or during night vigils, to seek total clarity of life.

title: Seeking Refuge from Lethargy, Senility & Helplessness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْهَرَمِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-jubni wal-haram, wa a'udhu bika min 'adhabil-qabr, wa a'udhu bika min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from helplessness and laziness, cowardice and old age; I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and from the trials of life and death.
context: Highly recommended when struggling with procrastination, lack of motivation, fatigue, or general anxiety about aging.

title: Dua Against Bitter Fate and Enemies' Malice
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَهْدِ الْبَلاَءِ، وَدَرَكِ الشَّقَاءِ، وَسُوءِ الْقَضَاءِ، وَشَمَاتَةِ الأَعْدَاءِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min jahdil-bala'i, wa darakish-shaqa'i, wa soo'il-qada'i, wa shamatatil-a'da'
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the difficulties of severe trials, from being overtaken by misery, from an evil decree, and from the malice of enemies.
context: Recite to shield yourself against sudden overwhelming disasters, extreme stress, and bad outcomes in complex affairs.

title: Sleeping Adhkar for Complete Spiritual Submission
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، وَأَلْجَأْتُ ظَهْرِي إِلَيْكَ، رَغْبَةً وَرَهْبَةً إِلَيْكَ، لاَ مَلْجَأَ وَلاَ مَنْجَا مِنْكَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْكَ، آمَنْتُ بِكِتَابِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ، وَبِنَبِيِّكَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلْتَ
transliteration: Allahumma aslamtu nafsee ilayk, wa fawwadtu amree ilayk, wa alja'tu dhahree ilayk, raghbatan wa rahbatan ilayk. La malja'a wa la manja minka illa ilayk. Amantu bikitabikal-ladhee anzalt, wa binabiyyikal-ladhee arsalt
translation: O Allah, I submit myself to You, entrust my affairs to You, and turn my back to You, in hope and fear of You. There is no refuge or escape from You except to You. I believe in Your Book which You have revealed and in Your Prophet whom You have sent.
context: Recite right before falling asleep. The Prophet (ﷺ) said that if you pass away during the night after making this prayer, you die upon natural fitrah.

title: Protection from Selfishness and Whispers of Satan
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ وَشِرْكِهِ
transliteration: Allahumma fatiras-samawati wal-ard, 'alimal-ghaybi wash-shahadah, Rabba kulli shay'in wa maleekah. Ash-hadu an la ilaha illa Ant, a'udhu bika min sharri nafsee wa min sharrish-shaytani wa shirkihi
translation: O Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the seen, Lord and Sovereign of all things. I bear witness that there is no deity worthy of worship except You. I seek refuge in You from the evil of my own self and from the evil of Satan and his whispers.
context: Recite once in the morning and evening to control ego, maintain spiritual humility, and prevent negative spiritual whispers.

title: Dua for Beneficial Knowledge, Pure Rizq & Accepted Deeds
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good and pure provision, and deeds that are accepted.
context: Recite every morning after Fajr prayer to align your day's work, income pursuit, and learning goals productively.

title: Seeking Safety from Debts, Scarcity and Hunger
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُوعِ فَإِنَّهُ بِئْسَ الضَّجِيعُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخِيَانَةِ فَإِنَّهَا بِئْسَتِ الْبِطَانَةُ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-joo'i fa-innahu bi'sad-dajee', wa a'u'dhu bika minal-khiyanati fa-innaha bi'satil-bitanah
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from hunger, for it is an evil bedfellow, and I seek refuge in You from treachery, for it is an evil trait.
context: Recite to find emotional and physical relief when suffering from acute poverty, food insecurity, or betrayal of close ones.

title: Prayer for Decisive Truth, Victory, and Fairness
arabic: رَبَّنَا افْتَحْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ قَوْمِنَا بِالْحَقِّ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الْفَاتِحِينَ
transliteration: Rabbanaftah baynana wa bayna qawmina bil-haqqi wa Anta khayrul-fatiheen
translation: Our Lord, judge between us and our people in truth, and You are the best of those who give judgment.
context: Recite when entering legal negotiations, arbitration, family disputes, or seeking clear-cut justice over an issue.

title: Prophet Ibrahim's Prayer for Safety & Guarding of Belief
arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْ هَٰذَا الْبَلَدَ آمِنًا وَاجْنُبْنِي وَبَنِيَّ أَن نَّعْبُدَ الْأَصْنَامَ
transliteration: Rabbij-'al hadhal-balada aminan wajnubnee wa baniyya an na'budal-asnam
translation: My Lord, make this city secure and keep me and my sons away from worshipping idols.
context: Recite to pray for the peace, civic order, and safety of your hometown, as well as preserving your family's religious purity.

title: Dua of Prophet Zakariya for Righteous Descendants
arabic: رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi la tadharni fardan wa Anta khayrul-waritheen
translation: My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors.
context: A classic, beautiful supplication for married couples hoping for children or trying to overcome infertility.

title: Zakariya's Supplication for Honorable Offspring
arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِن لَّدُنكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً ۖ إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
transliteration: Rabbi hab lee mil-ladunka dhurriyyatan tayyibatan innaka samee'ud-du'a'
translation: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a good offspring. Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplication.
context: Recite to invite goodness, moral uprightness, physical health, and obedience into the traits of your children.

title: Dua for Protection from Fruitless Knowledge & Empty Prayers
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لاَ يَنْفَعُ، وَمِنْ قَلْبٍ لاَ يَخْشَعُ، وَمِنْ نَفْسٍ لاَ تَشْبَعُ، وَمِنْ دَعْوَةٍ لاَ يُسْتَجَابُ لَهَا
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'ilmin la yanfa'u, wa min qalbin la yakhsha'u, wa min nafsin la tashba'u, wa min da'watin la yustajabu laha
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit, from a heart that does not fear, from a soul that is never satisfied, and from a prayer that is not answered.
context: Use this daily to keep your educational pursuits productive, maintain genuine humbleness, avoid insatiable greed, and protect your relationship with prayer.

title: Sincere Thanksgiving for Divine Guidance
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي هَدَانَا لِهَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلَا أَنْ هَدَانَا اللَّهُ
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhee hadana lihadha wa ma kunna linahtadiya lawla an hadanallah
translation: Praise be to Allah, who has guided us to this; and we would never have been guided if Allah had not guided us.
context: The declaration of gratitude by the people of Paradise. Recite when celebrating major spiritual milestones, learning steps, or life successes.

title: Dua for Safety from Extreme Wealth and Extreme Scarcity
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ النَّارِ وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ، وَفِتْنَةِ الْقَبْرِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَشَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْغِنَى، وَشَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْفَقْرِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min fitnatin-nari wa 'adhabin-nar, wa fitnatil-qabri wa 'adhabil-qabr, wa sharri fitnatil-ghina, wa sharri fitnatil-faqr
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the trial of the Fire and its punishment, from the trial of the grave and its punishment, and from the evil trial of wealth, and the evil trial of poverty.
context: Excellent for keeping a healthy, humble balance with financial pursuits—protecting against the arrogance of excess and the desperation of extreme poverty.

title: Sincere Invocation for Pardon of Inner Mistakes & Extravagance
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي خَطِيئَتِي وَجَهْلِي، وَإِسْرَافِي فِي أَمْرِي، وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي
transliteration: Allahum-maghfir lee khatia'tee wa jahlee, wa israfee fee amree, wa ma Anta a'lamu bihi minnee
translation: O Allah, forgive me my mistakes, my ignorance, my extravagance in my affairs, and what You know of me better than I do.
context: A deeply humble prayer to wash away both conscious and unconscious errors, overspending, or moments of poor judgment.

title: Protection from Unexpected Loss of Blessings
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ، وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ، وَفُجَاءَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ، وَجَمِيعِ سَخَطِكَ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min zawali ni'matik, wa tahawwuli 'afiyatik, wa fuja'ati niqmatik, wa jamee'i sakhatik
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the loss of Your favor, the decline of the health/well-being You gave me, the suddenness of Your punishment, and all of Your anger.
context: Recite regularly to preserve your health, safety, livelihood, and peace of mind from sudden, unexpected catastrophes.

title: Prayer for Sincere Belief, Mercy, and Forgiveness
arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana amanna faghfir lana warhamna wa Anta khayrul-rahimeen
translation: Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful.
context: Recite regularly in your daily prayers to continuously anchor yourself to divine mercy and maintain spiritual integrity.

title: Protection from Devils and Negative External Influences
arabic: رَّبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَن يَحْضُرُونِ
transliteration: Rabbi a'udhu bika min hamazatish-shayateen wa a'udhu bika Rabbi ay-yahduroon
translation: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils, and I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me.
context: Recite when feeling sudden irrational anger, anxiety, intense moral temptation, or spiritual unease.

title: Comprehensive Forgiveness of All Past, Future, and Hidden Sins
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ، وَمَا أَسْرَفْتُ، وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي
transliteration: Allahum-maghfir lee ma qaddamtu wa ma akhkhartu, wa ma asrartu wa ma a'lantu, wa ma asraftu, wa ma Anta a'lamu bihi minnee
translation: O Allah, forgive me what I have done in the past and what I will do in the future, what I have concealed and what I have declared, what I have exceeded in, and what You know of me better than I do.
context: A complete and beautiful cleansing prayer of repentance to recite daily or after concluding your optional night prayers.

title: Dua for Victory, Steadfastness, and Mercy
arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَإِسْرَافَنَا فِي أَمْرِنَا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana-ghfir lana dhunoobana wa israfana fee amrina wa thabbit aqdamana wansurna 'alal-qawmil-kafireen
translation: Our Lord, forgive us our sins and our transgression in our affairs and plant firmly our feet and give us victory over the disbelieving people.
context: Recite when undertaking difficult missions, facing moral or societal challenges, or working under extreme pressure.

title: Prophet Ibrahim's Prayer for Submission and Repentance of Offspring
arabic: رَبَّنَا وَاجْعَلْنَا مُسْلِمَيْنِ لَكَ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِنَا أُمَّةً مُّسْلِمَةً لَّكَ وَأَرِنَا مَنَاسِكَنَا وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَا ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
transliteration: Rabbana waj'alna muslimayni laka wa min dhurriyyatina ummatan muslimatan laka wa arina manasikana wa tub 'alayna innaka Antat-Tawwabur-Raheem
translation: Our Lord, and make us submissive to You and from our descendants a submissive nation to You. And show us our rites and accept our repentance. Indeed, You are the Accepting of repentance, the Merciful.
context: Recite to invoke peace, regular prayer practice, and continuous repentance within your nuclear and extended family lineage.

title: Dua for Protection from Debt, Sins, and Grave Trials
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabil-qabri, wa a'udhu bika min fitnatil-maseehid-dajjali, wa a'udhu bika min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamati, Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-ma'thami wal-maghram
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and from the trial of the False Messiah, and from the trials of life and death. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from committing sins and from being overwhelmed by debt.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) recited this at the end of every ritual prayer before the salutations to guard against crushing debts and moral slips.

title: Dua for Healing of Chronic and Severe Sicknesses
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبَرَصِ وَالْجُنُونِ وَالْجُذَامِ وَمِنْ سَيِّئِ الأَسْقَامِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-barasi wal-junooni wal-judhami wa min sayyi'il-asqam
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from vitiligo, madness, leprosy, and from all evil diseases.
context: An exceptionally important protective prayer for physical safety, mental wellness, and immunity from sudden degenerative illnesses.

title: Invoking Relief from Unbearable Burdens and Hardships
arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ ۖ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَانَا فَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana wa la tuhammilna ma la taqata lana bih; wa'fu 'anna waghfir lana warhamna Anta mawlana fansurna 'alal-qawmil-kafireen
translation: Our Lord, and burden us not with that which we have no ability to bear. And pardon us; and forgive us; and have mercy upon us. You are our protector, so give us victory over the disbelieving people.
context: The powerful conclusion of Surah Al-Baqarah. Recite when feeling emotionally broken, overwhelmed by life's changes, or socially oppressed.

title: Prophet Moses' Prayer for Escape from Oppressors
arabic: رَبِّ نَجِّنِي مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi najjinee minal-qawmidh-dhalimeen
translation: My Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people.
context: Recite when entering hostile workspaces, dealing with legal issues, or seeking shelter from tyrants and abusive personalities.

title: Abu Bakr's Prayer for Deep Personal Mercy
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْمًا كَثِيرًا وَلاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ، وَارْحَمْنِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
transliteration: Allahumma inni dhalamtu nafsee dhulman katheeran wa la yaghfirudh-dhunooba illa Ant, faghfir lee maghfiratan min 'indika warhamnee innaka Antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem
translation: O Allah, I have wronged my soul greatly, and none can forgive sins except You. So grant me forgiveness from Yourself and have mercy on me. Indeed, You are the Forgiving, the Merciful.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) specifically taught this magnificent prayer to Abu Bakr to be integrated into daily ritual prayers.

title: Dua to Protect Faith from Mockery and Hostility
arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا رَبَّنَا ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
transliteration: Rabbana la taj'alna fitnatal-lilladheena kafaroo waghfir lana Rabbana innaka Antal-'Azeezul-Hakeem
translation: Our Lord, make us not [targets of] trial for the disbelievers, and forgive us, our Lord. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
context: An excellent prayer for preserving your Islamic values in secular environments and preventing others from testing or shaking your faith.

title: Sincere Thanksgiving for Parenting and Righteous Offspring
arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ وَأَصْلِحْ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِي ۖ إِنِّي تُبْتُ إِلَيْكَ وَإِنِّي مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi awzi'nee an ashkura ni'matakal-latee an'amta 'alayya wa 'ala walidayya wa an a'mala salihan tardhahu wa aslih lee fee dhurriyyatee innee tubtu ilayka wa innee minal-muslimeen
translation: My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to work righteousness of which You approve and make righteous for me my offspring. Indeed, I have turned to You in repentance, and indeed, I am of the Muslims.
context: Recite to develop high-level gratitude for your upbringing, maintain strong family bonds, and secure ancestral protection.

title: The Marketplace Dua for Blessings in Transactions
arabic: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لاَ يَمُوتُ، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, yuhyee wa yumeetu wa Huwa Hayyun la yamootu, biyadihil-khayru wa Huwa 'ala kulli shay'in Qadeer
translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and to Him belongs praise. He gives life and causes death, and He is the Living who does not die. In His Hand is all goodness, and He is over all things competent.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) said that whoever recites this upon entering the market/malls will have a million good deeds recorded, a million sins wiped out, and a palace built in Paradise.

title: Dua for Faith and Security with the New Moon
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالأَمْنِ وَالإِيمَانِ وَالسَّلاَمَةِ وَالإِسْلاَمِ رَبِّ وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ هِلاَلُ رُشْدٍ وَخَيْرٍ
transliteration: Allahumma ahillahu 'alayna bil-amni wal-eemani was-salamati wal-Islami, Rabbee wa Rabbukallah, hilalu rushdin wa khayr
translation: O Allah, bring this crescent over us with security and faith, safety and Islam. My Lord and your Lord is Allah. A crescent of guidance and goodness.
context: Recite when entering a new lunar month (like Ramadan) or starting any major new epoch or project in your life.

title: Prophetic Supplication in Times of Extreme Agony (Dua al-Karb)
arabic: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-'Adheemul-Haleem, la ilaha illallahu Rabbus-samawati wal-ardi wa Rabbul-'arshil-'adheem
translation: There is no deity except Allah, the Great, the Forbearing. There is no deity except Allah, Lord of the heavens and the earth and Lord of the Magnificent Throne.
context: Recite repeatedly when facing life-changing disasters, immense pressure, severe physiological shock, or sudden bad news.

title: Prophet Noah's Prayer to Guard Against Ignorant Requests
arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَسْأَلَكَ مَا لَيْسَ لِي بِهِ عِلْمٌ ۖ وَإِلَّا تَغْفِرْ لِي وَتَرْحَمْنِي أَكُن مِّنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi innee a'udhu bika an as'alaka ma laysa lee bihi 'ilm, wa illa taghfir lee watarhamnee akun minal-khasireen
translation: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from asking You for that of which I have no knowledge. And unless You forgive me and have mercy upon me, I will be among the losers.
context: A humble prayer of submission to the divine decree. Perfect for realigning your personal hopes and goals with Allah's infinite wisdom.

title: Supplication to Make Complex Tasks Unbelievably Easy
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلاً
transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, wa Anta taj'alul-hazna idha shi'ta sahla
translation: O Allah, there is no ease except what You make easy, and You can make difficulty easy if You so will.
context: An essential developer, student, and founder prayer. Recite before debugging major software bugs, taking exams, or solving highly complex blockages.

title: Prayer for Consistency in Devotion, Gratitude & Beauty
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
transliteration: Allahumma a'innee 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik
translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, to express gratitude to You, and to worship You in the most beautiful manner.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) advised Mu'adh ibn Jabal never to omit this prayer at the end of every Salah. Excellent for spiritual growth.

title: Prophetic Supplication for Love of Faith and Dislike of Sin
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَبِّبْ إِلَيْنَا الْإِيمَانَ وَزَيِّنْهُ فِي قُلُوبِنَا، وَكَرِّهْ إِلَيْنَا الْكُفْرَ وَالْفُسُوقَ وَالْعِصْيَانَ، وَاجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الرَّاشِدِينَ
transliteration: Allahumma habbib ilaynal-eemana wa zayyinhu fee quloobina, wa karrih ilaynal-kufra wal-fusooga wal-'isyana, waj'alna minar-rashideen
translation: O Allah, make faith dear to us and beautify it in our hearts, and make disbelief, rebellion, and disobedience hateful to us, and make us among those who are rightly guided.
context: A profound spiritual development prayer. Recite daily to protect your heart against moral corruption, spiritual complacency, and bad peer habits.

title: Dua to Escape Association with Wrongdoers
arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مَعَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana la taj'alna ma'al-qawmidh-dhalimeen
translation: Our Lord, do not place us with the wrongdoing people.
context: Recite when working in toxic corporate structures, bad neighborhoods, or when looking to remove negative influencers from your life.

title: Shield Against Bad Companions and Abusive Spouses
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَارِ السُّوءِ، وَمِنْ زَوْجٍ تُشِيبُنِي قَبْلَ الْمَشِيبِ، وَمِنْ وَلَدٍ يَكُونُ عَلَيَّ رَبًّا
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min jaris-soo'i, wa min zawjin tusheebunee qablal-masheebi, wa min waladin yakoonu 'alayya rabban
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from an evil neighbor, from a spouse who turns my hair grey before old age, and from offspring who become a master over me.
context: An outstanding protection prayer for personal safety and family harmony, protecting you from highly stressful environments.

title: Prophet Noah's Prayer for Blessed Relocation and Success
arabic: رَّبِّ أَنزِلْنِي مُنزَلًا مُّبَارَكًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الْمُنزِلِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi anzilnee munzalan mubarakan wa Anta khayrul-munzileen
translation: My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, for You are the best of those who bring to land.
context: Recite when buying a house, relocating to a new city, opening an office, starting a SaaS database, or launching a new venture.

title: Protection from Disasters, Drowning, Fire, and Satanic Missteps
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ التَّرَدِّي وَالْهَدْمِ وَالْغَرَقِ وَالْحَرِيقِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ يَتَخَبَّطَنِيَ الشَّيْطَانُ عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minat-taraddee wal-hadmi wal-gharaqi wal-hareeqi, wa a'udhu bika an yatakhabbataniyash-shaytanu 'indal-mawt
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from falling from high places, from being crushed by collapsing structures, from drowning, and from being burned; and I seek refuge in You lest Satan should bewilder or touch me at the moment of death.
context: An all-encompassing safety prayer. Highly recommended for daily safety while traveling, working, or residing in high-risk zones.

title: The Master Supplication of Absolute Surrender to the Creator
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبَّ الأَرْضِ وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، رَبَّنَا وَرَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، فَالِقَ الْحَبِّ وَالنَّوَى، وَمُنْزِلَ التَّوْرَاةِ وَالإِنجِيلِ وَالْفُرْقَانِ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهِ
transliteration: Allahumma Rabbas-samawati wa Rabbal-ardi wa Rabbal-'arshil-'adheem, Rabbana wa Rabba kulli shay'in, faliqal-habbi wan-nawa, wa munzilat-Tawrati wal-Injeeli wal-Furqan, a'udhu bika min sharri kulli shay'in Anta akhidhum-binasiyatih
translation: O Allah, Lord of the heavens, Lord of the earth, and Lord of the Magnificent Throne! Our Lord and Lord of all things, splitter of the grain and the date-stone, Revealer of the Torah, the Gospel, and the Criterion (Quran). I seek refuge in You from the evil of everything whose forelock is in Your Hand.
context: Recite at bedtime or during moments of extreme spiritual isolation to connect deeply with Allah's absolute power and control over your universe.

title: Prophet Ibrahim's Prayer for Wisdom and an Honorable Reputation
arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ وَاجْعَل لِّي لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الْآخِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi hab lee hukman wa alhiqnee bis-saliheena waj'al lee lisana sidqin fil-akhireen
translation: My Lord, grant me authority/wisdom and join me with the righteous. And grant me a reputation of honor among future generations.
context: Recite when working toward personal leadership, publishing written material, creating lasting value, or seeking noble peer groups.

title: Quick Prophetic Shield against Whispers of Doubt and Temptation
arabic: آمَنْتُ بِاللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ
transliteration: Amantu billahi wa rusulih
translation: I believe in Allah and His Messengers.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) instructed that if a person experiences troubling spiritual whispers or obsessive-compulsive doubts (Waswasah), they should recite this.

title: Shielding Children from the Evil Eye and Spiritual Harm
arabic: أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ، وَمِن كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
transliteration: U'eedhukuma bikalimatil-lahit-tammati min kulli shaytanin wa hammatin, wa min kulli 'aynin lammah
translation: I commend you to the protection of Allah's perfect words from every devil, evil beast, and from every envious, harmful eye.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) recited this over his grandsons Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn. Parents should recite this daily over their children to keep them protected.

title: Heavenly Thanksgiving for the Removal of Grief and Anxiety
arabic: وَقَالُوا الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَذْهَبَ عَنَّا الْحَزَنَ ۖ إِنَّ رَبَّنَا لَغَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ
transliteration: Wa qalul-hamdu lillahil-ladhee adh-haba 'annal-hazana inna Rabbana la-Ghafoorun Shakoor
translation: And they will say, 'Praise be to Allah, who has removed from us all sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and appreciative.'
context: The declaration of the dwellers of Paradise. Recite upon surviving major panic, overcoming periods of clinical grief, or reaching safe harbors.

title: Sincere Quranic Cry for Ultimate Forgiveness and Care
arabic: رَّبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
transliteration: Rabbigh-fir warham wa Anta khayrur-rahimeen
translation: My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful.
context: A classic, short, yet incredibly powerful Quranic supplication. Best recited between prostrations in prayer or during late-night vigils.

title: Dua for Victory, Steadfastness, and Resolute Hearts
arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbana afrigh 'alayna sabran wa thabbit aqdamana wansurna 'alal-qawmil-kafireen
translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and plant firmly our feet and give us victory over the disbelieving people.
context: Recite when stepping into major competitive exams, business pitches, facing overwhelming trials, or asserting ethical stances.

title: Dua to Protect Against Unseen Mistakes and Omissions
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا عَمِلْتُ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا لَمْ أَعْمَلْ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min sharri ma 'amiltu wa min sharri ma lam a'mal
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done, and from the evil of what I have not done.
context: Use this daily to cleanse yourself of hidden consequences from unconscious mistakes, passive negligence, or career blindspots.

title: Dua for Precision, Clarity, and Straightforward Action
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي وَسَدِّدْنِي
transliteration: Allahummah-dinee wa saddidnee
translation: O Allah, guide me and keep me on the straight path (make me precise/correct).
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) told Ali to keep this in mind as hitting a target with an arrow. Perfect before making difficult, high-stakes decisions.

title: The Master Quranic Prayer for Parents and Believers
arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
transliteration: Rabbanagh-fir lee waliwalidayya walilmumineena yawma yaqoomul-hisab
translation: Our Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers the Day the account is established.
context: Recite routinely in your voluntary night prayers to establish a lifelong practice of interceding for your parents' salvation.

title: Supplication to Preserve Senses and Overcome Social Hostility
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَتِّعْنِي بِسَمْعِي وَبَصَرِي وَاجْعَلْهُمَا الْوَارِثَ مِنِّي، وَانْصُرْنِي عَلَى مَنْ يَظْلِمُنِي، وَخُذْ مِنْهُ بِثَأْرِي
transliteration: Allahumma matti'nee bisam'ee wa basaree waj'alhumal-waritha minnee, wansurnee 'ala may-yadhlimunee, wa khudh minhu bitha'ree
translation: O Allah, preserve my hearing and my sight, make them survive me, help me against those who oppress me, and take vengeance upon them for me.
context: An extremely strong protective prayer for anyone battling slander, workplace gaslighting, legal attacks, or systemic oppression.

title: Prophet Ibrahim's Prayer for Ultimate Trust and Return to the Creator
arabic: رَّبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
transliteration: Rabbana 'alayka tawakkalna wa ilayka anabna wa ilaykal-maseer
translation: Our Lord, upon You we have relied, and to You we have returned, and to You is the destination.
context: An incredible prayer of absolute surrender. Recite daily to completely relieve stress regarding future events and trust in Allah's decree.

title: Prophetic Supplication for Complete Cleansing of All Sins
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ، دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
transliteration: Allahummagh-fir lee dhanbee kullahu, diqqahu wa jillahu, wa awwalahu wa akhirahu, wa 'alaniyatahu wa sirrah
translation: O Allah, forgive me all my sins, the small and the great, the first and the last, the open and the secret.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) recited this comprehensive prayer of repentance inside his prostration (Sujud) during prayers.

title: Quranic Declaration of Obedience and Request for Mercy
arabic: غُفْرَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
transliteration: Ghufranaka Rabbana wa ilaykal-maseer
translation: [We seek] Your forgiveness, our Lord, and to You is the [final] destination.
context: The central focal phrase of Surah Al-Baqarah's conclusion. Recite as a humble recognition of human limits and reliance on divine pardon.

title: The Blessed Supplication of Laylatul Qadr (Night of Decree)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'Afuwwun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'annee
translation: O Allah, indeed You are Pardoning, You love pardon, so pardon me.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) specifically instructed Aisha (RA) to repeat this frequently on the odd nights of Ramadan's last ten days.

title: Comprehensive Prayer for Multidimensional Safety and Preservation
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ وَمِنْ خَلْفِي وَعَنْ يَمِينِي وَعَنْ شِمَالِي وَمِنْ فَوْقِي وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي
transliteration: Allahummah-fadhnee min bayni yadayya, wa min khalfee, wa 'an yameenee, wa 'an shimaalee, wa min fawqee, wa a'udhu bi'adhamatika an ughtala min tahtee
translation: O Allah, protect me from before me and from behind me, and on my right and on my left, and from above me, and I seek refuge in Your greatness from being swallowed up from beneath me.
context: A crucial Morning and Evening protection Adhkar. Guards against sudden disasters, catastrophic accidents, and unseen spiritual threats.

title: Prophet Lut's Prayer for Victory over Corruption and Oppressive Cultures
arabic: رَبِّ انصُرْنِي عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْمُفْسِدِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi-nsurnee 'alal-qawmil-mufsideen
translation: My Lord, support me against the corrupting people.
context: Recite when struggling to maintain moral and spiritual boundaries inside highly toxic, modern corrupt environments.

title: Prophetic Prayer for Honorable Openings and Divine Support
arabic: رَبِّ أَدْخِلْنِي مُدْخَلَ صِدْقٍ وَأَخْرِجْنِي مُخْرَجَ صِدْقٍ وَاجْعَل لِّي مِن لَّدُنكَ سُلْطَانًا نَّصِيرًا
transliteration: Rabbi adkhilnee mudkhala sidqin wa akhrijnee mukhraja sidqin waj'al-lee mil-ladunka sultanan naseera
translation: My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and to exit a sound exit and grant me from Yourself a supporting authority.
context: Recite before launching a business, beginning a code sprint, signing major corporate agreements, or presenting strategic ideas.

title: Supplication for the Best of Manners, Character, and Intentions
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي لِأَحْسَنِ الْأَعْمَالِ وَأَحْسَنِ الْأَخْلَاقِ لَا يَهْدِي لِأَحْسَنِهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ
transliteration: Allahummah-dinee li-ahsanil-a'mali wa ahsanil-akhlaqi la yahdee li-ahsaniha illa Ant
translation: O Allah, guide me to the best of deeds and the best of manners, for none can guide to the best of them except You.
context: Use this daily during times of spiritual growth to refine personal habits, stop bad behavioral loops, and build empathetic character.

title: Universal Thanksgiving Prayer Following Meals and Sustenance
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhee at'amana wa saqana wa ja'alana muslimeen
translation: Praise be to Allah who has fed us and given us drink and made us Muslims.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) would recite this immediately upon completing meals to instill mindfulness, prevent greed, and show deep gratitude.

title: Supplication Against Cowardice, Decrepitude, and Grave Hardships
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أُرَدَّ إِلَى أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الدُّنْيَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-jubni, wa a'udhu bika an uradda ila ardhalil-'umuri, wa a'udhu bika min fitnatid-dunya, wa a'udhu bika min 'adhabil-qabr
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from cowardice, and I seek refuge in You from being sent back to a miserable old age, and I seek refuge in You from the trials of this life, and I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave.
context: Recite daily to maintain cognitive vitality, physical bravery, strength of character, and protection from life's major trials.

title: Sincere Quranic Request for Preservation from the Hellfire
arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
transliteration: Rabbana innana amanna faghfir lana dhunoobana wa qina 'adhaban-nar
translation: Our Lord, indeed we have believed, so forgive us our sins and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
context: Recite at dawn or late in the night. This is a primary quality of the righteous (Al-Muttaqin) highlighted by Allah.

title: Prophetic Supplication for Emotional Rescue and Sound Judgment
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَرْجُو فَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ وَأَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
transliteration: Allahumma rahmataka arjoo fala takilnee ila nafsee tarfata 'aynin wa aslih lee sha'nee kullahu la ilaha illa Ant
translation: O Allah, it is Your mercy that I hope for, so do not leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye, and rectify all my affairs. There is no deity worthy of worship except You.
context: Commonly referred to as the prayer of the distressed. Excellent when experiencing acute panic attacks, decision fatigue, or major blockages.

title: Supplication for Truth and Vindication Against False Accusations
arabic: رَبِّ انْصُرْنِي بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
transliteration: Rabbi-nsurnee bima kadh-dhaboon
translation: My Lord, support me because they have denied me.
context: Use this prayer when battling systemic gaslighting, corporate slandering, or false accusations within social or legal structures.

title: Supplication for Victory, Honorable Ranks, and Joyful Livelihood
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْفَوْزَ عِنْدَ الْقَضَاءِ، وَمَنَازِلَ الشُّهَدَاءِ، وَعَيْشَ السُّعَدَاءِ، وَالنَّصْرَ عَلَى الْأَعْدَاءِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-fawza 'indal-qada'i, wa manazilash-shuhada'i, wa 'ayshas-su'ada'i, wan-nasra 'alal-a'da'
translation: O Allah, I ask You for victory in decree, the stations of the martyrs, the lives of the fortunate, and support against enemies.
context: A majestic prayer for holistic success. Invokes physical safety, immense psychological ease, financial prosperity, and professional victory.

title: Prophet Nuh's Prayer for Parental Mercy and Believing Households
arabic: رَّبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ
transliteration: Rabbigh-fir lee waliwalidayya waliman dakhala baytiya mu'minan walilmumineena walmu'minat
translation: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women.
context: A beautiful household blessing prayer. Recite during gatherings, family dinners, or while entering a new residential space.

title: The Prayer of Divine Alignment and Steadfast Focus
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالسَّدَادَ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-huda was-sadad
translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance and correct direction/precision.
context: Taught by the Prophet (ﷺ) to encourage absolute clarity of mind, exact decision-making capabilities, and hitting targets cleanly.

title: Supplication Against Catastrophic Days, Bad Hours, and Toxic Neighbors
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ يَوْمِ السُّوءِ، وَمِنْ لَيْلَةِ السُّوءِ، وَمِنْ سَاعَةِ السُّوءِ، وَمِنْ صَاحِبِ السُّوءِ، وَمِنْ جَارِ السُّوءِ فِي دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min yawmis-soo'i, wa min laylatis-soo'i, wa min sa'atis-soo'i, wa min sahibis-soo'i, wa min jaris-soo'i fee daril-muqamah
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from an evil day, from an evil night, from an evil hour, from an evil companion, and from an evil neighbor in the place of permanent residence.
context: Recite in the morning to preemptively secure a clean, safe, and positive social, professional, and domestic environment.

title: A Sincere Quranic Plea to Efface Minor Wrongs and Join the Righteous
arabic: رَّبَّنَا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَكَفِّرْ عَنَّا سَيِّئَاتِنَا وَتَوَفَّنَا مَعَ الْأَبْرَارِ
transliteration: Rabbana faghfir lana dhunoobana wa kaffir 'anna sayyi'atina wa tawaffana ma'al-abrar
translation: Our Lord, so forgive us our sins and remove from us our evil deeds and cause us to die with the righteous.
context: The declaration of deep-thinking believers (Ulul-Albab). Recite during night reflections or following standard ritual prayers.

title: The Definitive Quranic Formula of Sincere Reliance and Sufficiency
arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
transliteration: Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal-wakeel
translation: Sufficient for us is Allah, and [He is] the best Disposer of affairs.
context: Recited by Ibrahim (AS) when thrown into the fire, and by the Companions during siege. Highly effective for massive courage.

title: Supplication for Inherent Blessings in All Endeavors and Work
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِي كُلِّ أَمْرِي وَتَقَبَّلْ مِنِّي صَالِحَ أَعْمَالِي
transliteration: Allahumma barik lee fee kulli amree wa taqabbal minnee saliha a'malee
translation: O Allah, bless me in all my affairs and accept from me my righteous deeds.
context: Recite when initiating complex long-term projects, software refactors, or new strategic partnerships to secure Barakah (blessings).

title: Supplication for Inspired Wisdom and Safety from Internal Ego
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلْهِمْنِي رُشْدِي، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
transliteration: Allahumma alhimnee rushdee, wa a'udhu bika min sharri nafsee
translation: O Allah, inspire me with my guidance (correct action) and protect me from the evil of my own soul.
context: A classic psychological calibration prayer. Recite before critical debates, crucial decisions, or when managing pride or anger.

title: Quick Defensive Shield Against Abuses of Hostile Personalities
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِيهِمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ
transliteration: Allahummak-fineehim bima shi't
translation: O Allah, suffice me against them in whatever way You will.
context: Taught by the Prophet (ﷺ) to be recited when facing immediate danger, bullies, high-stakes investigations, or aggressive enemies.

title: The Sacred Recovery Formula Following Serious Loss and Calamity
arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي، وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'oon. Allahumma'-jurnee fee museebatee wa akhlif lee khayran minha
translation: Indeed, we belong to Allah and indeed to Him we will return. O Allah, reward me in my affliction and replace it for me with something better.
context: Recite immediately upon hearing tragic news, losing a job, experiencing financial hits, or passing of loved ones.

title: High-Tier Phrase of Abundant and Blessed Praise
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ
transliteration: Alhamdulillahi hamdan katheeran tayyiban mubarakan feeh
translation: Praise be to Allah, a praise abundant, pure, and full of blessings.
context: A companion recited this in prayer. The Prophet (ﷺ) stated he saw over thirty angels racing to write this magnificent phrase down first.

title: The Constant Supplication of True Turning and Repentance
arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الْغَفُورُ
transliteration: Rabbigh-fir lee wa tub 'alayya innaka Antat-Tawwabul-Ghafoor
translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance, indeed You are the Accepting of repentance, the Forgiving.
context: Companions recorded that the Prophet (ﷺ) would repeat this exact phrase over one hundred times in a single sitting.

title: Supplication to Secure the Keys and Sealings of All Good Things
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَفَاتِيحَ الْخَيْرِ وَخَوَاتِيمَهُ، وَاجْعَلْ عَمَلِي كُلَّهُ خَيْرًا
transliteration: Allahumma mafaateehal-khayri wa khawateemahu waj'al 'amalee kullahu khayra
translation: O Allah, [grant me] the keys of goodness and its endings, and make all my actions good.
context: Use this beautiful prayer to set the tone for your daily productivity, long-term investments, and business launches.

title: Supplication Against Overbearing Debts and the Malice of Foes
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ، وَغَلَبَةِ الْعَدُوِّ، وَشَمَاتَةِ الْأَعْدَاءِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min ghalabatid-dayni, wa ghalabatil-'aduwwi, wa shamatatil-a'da'
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from being overwhelmed by debt, from being overcome by the enemy, and from the malice of enemies.
context: A protective shield prayer. Recite during extreme macroeconomic challenges, competitive corporate situations, or geopolitical pressures.

title: Sincere Invocation for Spousal Peace and Loving Lineage
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ لَنَا فِي أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا وَاجْعَلْهُمْ قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ لَنَا
transliteration: Allahumma aslih lana fee azwajina wa dhurriyyatina waj'alhum qurrata a'yunin lana
translation: O Allah, make righteous for us our spouses and offspring and make them the comfort of our eyes.
context: Recite during times of family strain, while raising young kids, or to welcome peace, patience, and affection back into your home.

title: The Essential Path of Correct Alignment and Favor
arabic: اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيهمْ
transliteration: Ihdinas-siratal-mustaqeem, siratal-ladheena an'amta 'alayhim
translation: Guide us to the straight path - The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor.
context: The central request of human existence. Repeated at least 17 times daily inside mandatory daily ritual prayers.

title: Defensive Shield for Isolation, Sleep Paralysis, and Night Terrors
arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ غَضَبِهِ وَعِقَابِهِ وَشَرِّ عِبَادِهِ وَمِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ
transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatil-lahit-tammati min ghadabihi wa 'iqabihi wa sharri 'ibadihi wa min hamazatish-shayateeni wa ay-yahduroon
translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger, His punishment, the evil of His servants, and from the whispers of the devils, and lest they should come near me.
context: Taught by the Prophet (ﷺ) for companions suffering from sudden anxiety, high-stress night paralysis, or feelings of isolation.

title: Supplication for Entering the Mosque (Seeking Divine Mercy)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
transliteration: Allahummaf-tah lee abwaba rahmatik
translation: O Allah, open for me the gates of Your mercy.
context: Recite upon stepping into any mosque with your right foot. Excellent for preparing your mind and soul for worship.

title: Supplication for Leaving the Mosque (Seeking Bounty & Opportunity)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
translation: O Allah, indeed I ask You of Your bounty.
context: Recite when exiting the mosque with your left foot. Perfect to program your mindset for seeking ethical wealth and success in worldly affairs.

title: Supplication for Protection Against Hypocrisy and Hidden Spiritual Pride
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ بِكَ وَأَنَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لاَ أَعْلَمُ
transliteration: Allahumma innee a'udhu bika an ushrika bika wa ana a'lam, wa astaghfiruka lima la a'lam
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You lest I associate anything with You while I know, and I seek Your forgiveness for what I do not know.
context: Taught by the Prophet (ﷺ) to cleanse the heart of hidden vanity, showing off (Riya'), and spiritual complacency.

title: Prophetic Tahajjud Supplication to Resolve Deep Confusion & Indecision
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ جِبْرَائِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ وَإِسْرَافِيلَ، فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ، عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ، أَنْتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِيمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ، اهْدِنِي لِمَا اخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ، إِنَّكَ تَهْدِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
transliteration: Allahumma Rabba Jibra'eela wa Meeka'eela wa Israfeela, fatiras-samawati wal-ardi, 'alimal-ghaybi wash-shahadah, Anta tahkumu bayna 'ibadika feema kanoo feehi yakhtalifoon, ihdinee limakh-tulifa feehi minal-haqqi bi-idhnik, innaka tahdee man tasha'u ila siratin mustaqeem
translation: O Allah, Lord of Gabriel, Michael, and Israfel, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the seen, You judge between Your servants in what they used to differ. Guide me, by Your permission, to the truth concerning that about which they differed. Indeed, You guide whom You will to a straight path.
context: The Prophet (ﷺ) opened his voluntary night prayers (Tahajjud) with this. Use it to overcome severe mental blocks, confusion, and moral dilemmas.

title: Prophetic Thanksgiving for Superior Talents & Distinct Favor
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhee faddalana 'ala katheerim-min 'ibadihil-mu'mineen
translation: Praise be to Allah, who has favored us over many of His believing servants.
context: Recite when realizing a unique talent, sudden professional advancement, academic achievement, or high financial favor.

title: Supplication of Resolute Trust in the Divine Control of Provision
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ كُلُّهُ، اللَّهُمَّ لاَ مَانِعَ لِمَا بَسَطْتَ، وَلاَ بَاسِطَ لِمَا قَبَضْتَ، وَلاَ هَادِيَ لِمَنْ أَضْلَلْتَ، وَلاَ مُضِلَّ لِمَنْ هَدَيْتَ
transliteration: Allahumma lakal-hamdu kulluhu. Allahumma la mani'a lima basatta, wa la basita lima qabadhta, wa la hadiya liman adhlalta, wa la mudhilla liman hadayt
translation: O Allah, to You belongs all praise. O Allah, there is none to prevent what You extend, and none to extend what You contract, none to guide whom You send astray, and none to send astray whom You guide.
context: Use this during periods of market recession, job loss, or sudden business contraction to keep your heart in perfect, serene submission.

title: Prophet Shu'ayb's Declarative Formula for Complete Professional Success
arabic: وَمَا تَوْفِيقِي إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ ۚ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَإِلَيْهِ أُنِيبُ
transliteration: Wa ma tawfeeqee illa billah, 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa ilayhi uneeb
translation: And my success is not but through Allah. Upon Him I have relied, and to Him I return.
context: The ultimate formula of humble reliance. Perfect to place inside your workspace, software dashboards, or recite before pitching.

title: Supplication for Bodily Health, Senses, and Mental Vitality
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عافِنِي فِي جَسَدِي، وَعافِنِي فِي عَيْنِي، وَاجْعَلْهُ الْوارِثَ مِنِّي، لا إِلَهَ إِلا أَنْتَ الْحَلِيمُ الْكَرِيمُ
transliteration: Allahumma 'afinee fee jasadee, wa 'afinee fee 'aynee, waj'alhul-waritha minnee, la ilaha illa Antal-Haleemul-Kareem
translation: O Allah, grant me health in my body, grant me health in my sight, and make it the survivor from me. There is no deity worthy of worship except You, the Forbearing, the Generous.
context: Recite when experiencing acute physical strain, eye tiredness from screens, or while recovering from severe illnesses.

title: Prophetic Supplication for Reconciling Family Relationships
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا، وَأَصْلِحْ ذَاتَ بَيْنِنَا، وَاهْدِنَا سُبُلَ السَّلامِ، وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ
transliteration: Allahumma allif bayna quloobina, wa aslih dhata baynina, wahdina subulas-salami, wa najjina minadh-dhulumati ilan-noor
translation: O Allah, join our hearts, mend our relations, guide us to the paths of peace, and deliver us from darkness into light.
context: An amazing prayer of reconciliation. Recite during family meetings, marriage counselling sessions, or following standard prayers.

title: Universal Supplication for Laser-focused Spiritual Integrity
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مُصَرِّفَ الْقُلُوبِ صَرِّفْ قُلُوبَنَا عَلَى طَاعَتِكَ
transliteration: Allahumma Musarrifal-quloobi sarrif quloobana 'ala ta'atik
translation: O Allah, Director of hearts, direct our hearts to Your obedience.
context: Recite daily to anchor your mind against spiritual distractions, maintaining laser focus on your core ethical duties.

title: The Prophetic Prayer Recited Between the Two Prostrations
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاجْبُرْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
transliteration: Allahum-maghfir lee war-hamnee, wa-jburnee, wa-hdinee, wa-rzuqnee
translation: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, mend my shortcomings, guide me, and provide for me.
context: Recited in standard daily prayers between the two prostrations (Sujud). A highly effective comprehensive routine for daily spiritual reset.

title: Prophetic Bedtime Adhkar to Safeguard Against Insomnia and Dread
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، رَبَّنَا وَرَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، اكْفِنِي كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَاحْفَظْنِي بِحِفْظِكَ
transliteration: Allahumma Rabbas-samawatis-sab'i wa Rabbal-'arshil-'adheem, Rabbana wa Rabba kulli shay'in, ikfinee kulla shay'in wahfadhnee bihifdhik
translation: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Magnificent Throne, our Lord and Lord of all things, suffice me against all things and protect me with Your protection.
context: Recite before sleeping to dissolve systemic anxiety, insomnia, and the weight of stressful daily struggles.

title: Quranic Formula of Absolute Trust in the Distribution of Mercy
arabic: مَا يَفْتَحِ اللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِن رَّحْمَةٍ فَلَا مُمْسِكَ لَهَا
transliteration: Ma yaftahil-lahu lin-nasi mir-rahmatin fala mumsika laha
translation: Whatever Allah opens to people of mercy - none can withhold it.
context: A majestic declaration of ultimate safety, peace, and spiritual abundance. Reflect on this to cultivate profound gratitude.

title: The Sacred Formula of Ultimate Surrender and Trust
arabic: وَأُفَوِّضُ أَمْرِي إِلَى اللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَصِيرٌ بِالْعِبَادِ
transliteration: Wa ufawwidu amree ilal-lah, innal-laha baseerun bil-'ibad
translation: And I entrust my affair to Allah. Indeed, Allah is Seeing of [His] servants.
context: Recited by the believer in Pharaoh's court under threat of death. Recite when facing highly intimidating environments to ground your courage.

title: Morning Supplication for Lawful Wealth, Learning, and Restoration
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ رِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَشِفَاءً مِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka rizqan tayyiban, wa 'ilman nafi'an, wa shifa'an min kulli da'in
translation: O Allah, indeed I ask You for pure/lawful provision, beneficial knowledge, and cure from every ailment.
context: A beautiful daily prayer. Best recited in the morning to bless your work, learning pace, and physical vitality.

title: Supplication Against Psychological Trials and Chest Restlessness
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الصَّدْرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min fitnatis-sadri, wa min fitnatil-qabri, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat
translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the trials of the chest (doubts/anger), from the trials of the grave, and from the trials of life and death.
context: Clears deep internal stress, heavy breathing from pressure, panic states, and negative spiritual trials.

title: The Angels' Intercessory Supplication for Believing Generations
arabic: رَبَّنَا وَأَدْخِلْهُمْ جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ الَّتِي وَعَدتَّهُم وَمَن صَلَحَ مِنْ آبَائِهِمْ وَأَزْوَاجِهِمْ وَذُرِّيَّاتِهِمْ
transliteration: Rabbana wa adkhilhum jannati 'adninil-latee wa'adtahum wa man salaha min aba'ihim wa azwajihim wa dhurriyyatihim
translation: Our Lord, and admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which You have promised them and whoever was righteous among their fathers, their spouses and their offspring.
context: Recite during daily family prayers to build intergenerational mercy, protective blessings, and spiritual safety for your loved ones.

title: Supplication for the Deep Purification and Piety of the Soul
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ آتِ نَفْسِي تَقْوَاهَا، وَزَكِّهَا أَنْتَ خَيْرُ مَنْ زَكَّاهَا، أَنْتَ وَلِيُّهَا وَمَوْلاَهَا
transliteration: Allahumma aati nafsee taqwaha, wa zakkiha Anta khayru man zakkaha, Anta Waliyyuha wa Mawlaha
translation: O Allah, grant my soul its piety and purify it, for You are the Best to purify it. You are its Guardian and its Patron.
context: Taught by the Prophet (ﷺ) to build unbreakable internal resilience, emotional discipline, and absolute integrity under pressure.

title: Prophet Moses' Instant Supplication of Repentance Following an Error
arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي
transliteration: Rabbi innee dhalamtu nafsee faghfir lee
translation: My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me.
context: Recite in moments of deep realization, regret, and immediate seeking of the divine cover after making a moral slip.

title: Prophetic Healing Formula for Acute Physical and Mental Distress
arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ أَذْهِبْ عَنِّي شَرَّ مَا أَجِدُ
transliteration: Bismillahi Allahumma adh-hib 'annee sharra ma ajid
translation: In the Name of Allah, O Allah, remove from me the evil of what I experience.
context: An amazing short formula of healing. Recite while placing your hand on an area of physical or mental distress.

title: Morning Thanksgiving for the Gift of Re-awakening
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhee ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushoor
